codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: حدث خطأ ما. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect إلى server. Please check your internet connection و try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long إلى respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection و try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts مع newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields و try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: حدث خطأ ما while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect إلى server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please تحديث و try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return إلى التتبع و try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not حفظ your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment و try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An خطأ occurred while جارٍ التحميل this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid البريد الإلكتروني أو كلمة المرور. Please check your details و try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please اختيار a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. تسجيل الدخول again إلى متابعة.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This البريد الإلكتروني is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid أو expired
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: تعذر حفظ admission record. يرجى التحقق من الاتصال والمحاولة مرة أخرى
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some مطلوب admission details are missing. Please مراجعة highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable إلى generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still مراجعة و حفظ admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: تعذر تحميل admission form. يرجى التحقق من الاتصال والمحاولة مرة أخرى
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: تعذر حفظ local admission draft. Please try again

capture.title: Dataset capture
capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted لـ reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets أو sent إلى external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write الدور.
capture.offlineNotice: غير متصل submissions are في قائمة الانتظار مع structured fields only و sync when connectivity returns.
capture.notePlaceholder: Paste a de-identified bedside note, then مراجعة structured fields before submitting.
capture.facilityMissing: اختر أو sign in إلى one active المرفق before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.
capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured مراجعة payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed مراجعة workflows.

privacy.title: الخصوصية
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences و session data are stored only on this device. لا يوجدthing is sent إلى external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If متصل AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent إلى configured services.

about.title: حول
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype لـ reference و training. لا يوجدt لـ clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support و advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, أو determine جهاز التنفس الإعدادات.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against المريض, your المرفق workflow, و local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: مطلوب before continuing إلى clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device و will be تمت المزامنة when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: مراجعة safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data و uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible لـ المريض care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in المرفق context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active المرفق و الدور shown by your session. Keep records within correct المرفق workflow و follow local escalation, مراجعة, و approval procedures.

inputs.title: أدخلing inputs
inputs.body: Use إدخال إلى أدخل available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). اختياري ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing اختياري data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a حفظ blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations إظهار advisory جهاز التنفس setting references مع a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align مع your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only و verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: المراقبة و alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a التوصية, use المراقبة إلى log vitals و labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds و should be assessed according إلى local protocol.

offline.title: غير متصل behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (إدخال, advisory summaries, المراقبة) works غير متصل. Data is saved locally. اختياري AI features require connectivity. When رجوع متصل, متابعة as طبيعي.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume و oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory إلى expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: الحجم الجاري (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, و pH, tied إلى a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance و verification state لـ a reference range. Only active approved أو verified ranges are eligible لـ active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need مراجعة before dataset أو training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue لـ مراجعة decisions, corrections, exclusions, و audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current غير متصل, متصل, أو syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden من طبيعي clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; أدخل SpO₂ و آخر vitals when available. لـ better matching, إضافة PaO₂, PaCO₂, و pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app غير متصل
offline.body: إدخال, advisory summaries, و المراقبة work غير متصل. Data is stored locally. اختياري AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not مطلوب لـ core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, قيد الانتظار, retired, rejected, و unverified ranges are not eligible لـ active decision-support display. مراجعة source, version, scope, و verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness المساعدة is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness و shadow-mode details are visible only إلى approved governance roles. لا يوجدrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs مراجعة
needsReview.body: Use مراجعة queue إلى check submitted data, request correction, موافقة eligible records, أو استبعاد records مع an audit السبب.

guides.home: مراجعة المرفق context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, و records needing مراجعة before opening a المريض workflow.
guides.admit: Capture المريض pathway و available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly و مراجعة backend-confirmed calculations after حفظ.
guides.tracking: Use التتبع إلى scan recent ventilation status و مراجعة needs. Read trend flags مع source data و local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture لـ de-identified candidate records. Human مراجعة is مطلوب before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use مراجعة queue إلى موافقة, request correction, أو استبعاد records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards لـ aggregate quality, مراجعة, reference, و governance status. Avoid المريض identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use الإعدادات لـ الحساب, المرفق, accessibility, الخصوصية, sync, و reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: مراجعة FiO₂ و PEEP; consider recruitment; check لـ shunt أو V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: مراجعة minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation و perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols و clinical judgment.

ai.label: دعم القرار بالذكاء الاصطناعي
ai.enableHint: Use متصل AI لـ complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture المريض pathway, العمر, body metrics, و السبب لـ support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, و uncertain values. جهاز التنفس الإعدادات are suggested on التالي step من dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support المريض is receiving when these values are measured.
oxygenAbgVentilator.timeHint: Use local date و time لـ observation.

saveReview.description: مراجعة و تعديل dataset-suggested جهاز التنفس الإعدادات, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override السبب when needed, مراجعة status, و sync state.
saveReview.suggestedSettingsHint: Prefilled from the dataset using patient biodata and the current oxygen and ABG values. Edit only when the bedside decision differs.
saveReview.recommendationEmpty: أدخل clinical values و tap التالي إلى generate a dataset التوصية.
saveReview.recommendationError: Unable إلى generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still مراجعة و حفظ admission.

saveReview.clinicianConfirmed: Clinician confirms this admission record is ready لـ حفظ مراجعة.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single الاسم–value pair. اختياري; you can skip this step.
observations.name: الاسم

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs أو آخر metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used لـ trend analysis و المراقبة after you start session. اختياري; you can إضافة points later on المراقبة screen.
